title: Three generations from modular invariance
notes: Phase 7b sub-wave 7b.3 CLOSED at GREEN 2026-05-01. 3-page Tier-2 PRL splash bundle (target PRL) shipped through full reviewer-triple pipeline: Stage 9 (2 rounds; 2 figure MINORs -> GREEN), Stage 10 (1 round; 24/24 PASS direct GREEN), Stage 13 (1 round; 0 BLOCKER GREEN). Substantive content: c_- = 8 N_f from SM Weyl content + 24 | c_- from Dedekind eta framing anomaly => N_f = 0 mod 3; first machine-checked Ext computation over Steenrod sub-algebra A(1) (1,2,2,2,3,4 through deg 5); without-nu_R fractional c_- = 15/2 as formal evidence for nu_R; 16-convergence enumeration; lcm(16,3)=48 without-nu_R combined constraint. 3 advisories carried forward: L2-S13-A1 D2 cross-bridge deferred to D2 lift; L2-S13-A2 abstract-vs-body first-claim hedge consistency advisory; L2-S13-R1 registry-stub-title polish (pre-existing). 6 of 13 bundles now reviewer-triple-closed (L2 + D5 + I1 + I2 + L1 + L3); 7 source-only-green still need first-pass drafting (F + D1 + D2 + D3 + D4 + E1 + E2).
